steps.desc: 仅支持 read.action=detail
规范化 read.target/pick

action.code: function(target){ const t=(target&&typeof target==='object')?target:{}; const by=String(t.by||'auto').toLowerCase(); const selector=String(t.selector||'').trim(); const query=String(t.query||'').trim(); const pick = (t && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(t,'pick')) ? t.pick : 1; return { by, selector, query, pick }; }

steps.desc: 规范化 summary 策略与模型（默认 ai + fast）

action.code: function(read){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).trim(); } const r=(read&&typeof read==='object')?read:{}; const rawMode=asText(r.summaryMode).toLowerCase(); const mode=(rawMode==='rule' || rawMode==='auto' || rawMode==='ai') ? rawMode : 'ai'; const model=asText(r.summaryModel||'fast') || 'fast'; return { mode, model }; }

steps.desc: 按 target.by 路由
通过 query 解析目标 selector
使用 query 解析得到的 selector 提取 detail

action.code: function(selObj, pick, fields, requireFields, output){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function absUrl(href){ try{return new URL(String(href||''), location.href).href;}catch(_){ return String(href||''); } } function selectAllBy(by){ const s=String(by||'').trim(); if(!s) return []; if(s.startsWith('xpath:')){ const xp=s.slice(6).trim(); if(!xp) return []; const out=[]; const it=document.evaluate(xp,document,null,XPathResult.ORDERED_NODE_SNAPSHOT_TYPE,null); for(let i=0;i<it.snapshotLength;i++){ const n=it.snapshotItem(i); if(n&&n.nodeType===1) out.push(n);} return out; } let css=s; if(s.startsWith('css:')) css=s.slice(4).trim(); if(!css) return []; try{ return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(css)); }catch(_){ return []; } } function choose(nodes,pv){ if(!Array.isArray(nodes)||!nodes.length) return null; if(typeof pv==='number' && Number.isFinite(pv)){ const n=Math.trunc(pv); if(n===-1) return nodes[nodes.length-1]; const idx=Math.max(1,n)-1; return nodes[idx]||null; } const ps=asText(pv); if(ps){ const low=ps.toLowerCase(); for(const n of nodes){ const t=asText(n.innerText||n.textContent).toLowerCase(); if(t.includes(low)) return n; } } return nodes[0]||null; } function buildData(node, outMode){ const txt=asText(node? (node.innerText||node.textContent):''); const a=node?node.querySelector('a[href]'):null; const h=node?node.querySelector('h1,h2,h3,h4,[role="heading"]'):null; const tm=node?node.querySelector('time,[data-time],[datetime]'):null; const author=node?node.querySelector('[rel="author"],[itemprop="author"],.author,.byline,[data-author]'):null; const id=node? (node.getAttribute('data-id')||node.id||'') : ''; const url = a ? absUrl(a.getAttribute('href')||'') : location.href; const title = asText((h && (h.innerText||h.textContent)) || (a && (a.innerText||a.textContent)) || document.title || ''); const summary = txt.slice(0, 280); const content = outMode==='markdown' ? txt : txt; const html = node ? String(node.outerHTML||'') : ''; return { id: asText(id), url, title, summary, content, author: asText(author && (author.innerText||author.textContent)), time: asText((tm && (tm.getAttribute('datetime')||tm.innerText||tm.textContent)) || ''), html }; } const by = String((selObj&&selObj.by)||'').trim(); const pickVal = pick; const outMode = asText(output||'').toLowerCase()||'json'; const nodes = selectAllBy(by); const one = choose(nodes, pickVal); if(!one){ throw new Error('detail target not found'); } const raw = buildData(one, outMode); const wanted=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:['url','title','summary','content']; const data={}; for(const f0 of wanted){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(raw,f)) data[f]=raw[f]; else if(f==='text' || f==='body' || f==='article') data[f]=raw.content; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); return { action:'detail', data, missingFields, meta:{ matchedCount:nodes.length, by } }; }

steps.desc: 使用 read.target.selector 提取 detail

action.code: function(selector, pick, fields, requireFields, output){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function absUrl(href){ try{return new URL(String(href||''), location.href).href;}catch(_){ return String(href||''); } } function selectAllBy(by){ const s=String(by||'').trim(); if(!s) return []; if(s.startsWith('xpath:')){ const xp=s.slice(6).trim(); if(!xp) return []; const out=[]; const it=document.evaluate(xp,document,null,XPathResult.ORDERED_NODE_SNAPSHOT_TYPE,null); for(let i=0;i<it.snapshotLength;i++){ const n=it.snapshotItem(i); if(n&&n.nodeType===1) out.push(n);} return out; } let css=s; if(s.startsWith('css:')) css=s.slice(4).trim(); if(!css) return []; try{ return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(css)); }catch(_){ return []; } } function choose(nodes,pv){ if(!Array.isArray(nodes)||!nodes.length) return null; if(typeof pv==='number' && Number.isFinite(pv)){ const n=Math.trunc(pv); if(n===-1) return nodes[nodes.length-1]; const idx=Math.max(1,n)-1; return nodes[idx]||null; } const ps=asText(pv); if(ps){ const low=ps.toLowerCase(); for(const n of nodes){ const t=asText(n.innerText||n.textContent).toLowerCase(); if(t.includes(low)) return n; } } return nodes[0]||null; } function buildData(node, outMode){ const txt=asText(node? (node.innerText||node.textContent):''); const a=node?node.querySelector('a[href]'):null; const h=node?node.querySelector('h1,h2,h3,h4,[role="heading"]'):null; const tm=node?node.querySelector('time,[data-time],[datetime]'):null; const author=node?node.querySelector('[rel="author"],[itemprop="author"],.author,.byline,[data-author]'):null; const id=node? (node.getAttribute('data-id')||node.id||'') : ''; const url = a ? absUrl(a.getAttribute('href')||'') : location.href; const title = asText((h && (h.innerText||h.textContent)) || (a && (a.innerText||a.textContent)) || document.title || ''); const summary = txt.slice(0, 280); const content = outMode==='markdown' ? txt : txt; const html = node ? String(node.outerHTML||'') : ''; return { id: asText(id), url, title, summary, content, author: asText(author && (author.innerText||author.textContent)), time: asText((tm && (tm.getAttribute('datetime')||tm.innerText||tm.textContent)) || ''), html }; } const outMode = asText(output||'').toLowerCase()||'json'; const nodes = selectAllBy(selector); const one = choose(nodes, pick); if(!one){ throw new Error('detail target not found'); } const raw = buildData(one, outMode); const wanted=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:['url','title','summary','content']; const data={}; for(const f0 of wanted){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(raw,f)) data[f]=raw[f]; else if(f==='text' || f==='body' || f==='article') data[f]=raw.content; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); return { action:'detail', data, missingFields, meta:{ matchedCount:nodes.length, by:String(selector||'') } }; }

steps.desc: 无明确 target 时，按页面级 detail 提取（readPage + 归一化）
页面级材料归一化为 detail

action.code: function(pageData, fields, requireFields, output){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } const p=(pageData&&typeof pageData==='object')?pageData:{}; const url=asText(p.url||''); const title=asText(p.title||''); const contentRaw=String(p.article==null?'':p.article); const content=asText(contentRaw); const outMode=asText(output||'').toLowerCase()||'json'; const raw={ url, title, summary: content.slice(0,280), content: outMode==='markdown'?contentRaw:content, html:'', author:'', time:'', id:'' }; const wanted=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:['url','title','summary','content']; const data={}; for(const f0 of wanted){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(raw,f)) data[f]=raw[f]; else if(f==='text' || f==='body' || f==='article') data[f]=raw.content; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); return { action:'detail', data, missingFields, meta:{ from:'page' } }; }

steps.desc: 页面/target 提取失败时，用 run_ai 兜底抽取 detail

action.prompt: 你是网页详情提取器。请基于输入 page 上下文与 target 信息提取单条 detail，严格返回 JSON envelope。status='ok' 时 result 必须是对象：{url:string,title:string,summary:string,content:string,author:string,time:string,id:string}。无法判断的字段用空字符串。

steps.desc: AI 兜底结果归一化为 detail

action.code: function(aiOut, fields, requireFields, output){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } const a=(aiOut&&typeof aiOut==='object')?aiOut:{}; const outMode=asText(output||'').toLowerCase()||'json'; const raw={ id:asText(a.id||''), url:asText(a.url||''), title:asText(a.title||''), summary:asText(a.summary||''), content: outMode==='markdown' ? String(a.content==null?'':a.content) : asText(a.content||''), author:asText(a.author||''), time:asText(a.time||''), html:'' }; const wanted=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:['url','title','summary','content']; const data={}; for(const f0 of wanted){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(raw,f)) data[f]=raw[f]; else if(f==='text' || f==='body' || f==='article') data[f]=raw.content; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); return { action:'detail', data, missingFields, meta:{ from:'ai_fallback' } }; }

steps.desc: 按 summaryMode 决定是否用 AI 生成/改写 summary

action.code: function(detailOut, read, cfg){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).trim(); } const out=(detailOut&&typeof detailOut==='object')?detailOut:{}; const data=(out.data&&typeof out.data==='object')?out.data:{}; const fields=Array.isArray(read&&read.fields)?read.fields.map((x)=>asText(x)).filter(Boolean):[]; const needSummaryField=(!fields.length) || fields.includes('summary') || fields.includes('content') || fields.includes('article') || fields.includes('text'); const mode=asText(cfg&&cfg.mode).toLowerCase() || 'ai'; const summary=asText(data.summary); const content=asText(data.content || data.article || data.text); const weakSummary = !summary || summary.length < 48; const richContent = content.length >= 220; const needByAuto = weakSummary && richContent; const needAI = needSummaryField && (mode === 'ai' || (mode === 'auto' && needByAuto)); return { mode, needAI, model: asText(cfg&&cfg.model||'fast') || 'fast', weakSummary, richContent }; }

steps.desc: summaryMode=rule 或 auto 判定不需要 AI 时直接返回
开启 allowExplore 且有 summaryQuery 时，先由 AI 判断是否需要 find.until

action.code: function(read, summaryPlan, meta){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).trim(); } function asBool(v){ if(v===true) return true; const s=asText(v).toLowerCase(); return s==='1'||s==='true'||s==='yes'||s==='on'; } const r=(read&&typeof read==='object')?read:{}; const sp=(summaryPlan&&typeof summaryPlan==='object')?summaryPlan:{}; const m=(meta&&typeof meta==='object')?meta:{}; const summaryQuery=asText(r.summaryQuery); const allowExplore=asBool(r.allowExplore); const alreadyTried=!!m.exploreAttempted; const canPlan = !!(allowExplore && summaryQuery && !alreadyTried && sp.needAI); return { allowExplore, summaryQuery, alreadyTried, canPlan }; }

steps.desc: 仅在满足开关与 query 条件时进入探索判定
AI 判断是否需要先探索页面（find.until）

action.prompt: 你是网页信息补全规划器。任务：判断为了回答 summaryQuery，是否需要先执行页面探索。严格返回 JSON：{needExplore:boolean,reason:string,goal:string,maxSteps:number,allowedActions:string[]}。规则：1) 若现有 summary/content 足够回答，needExplore=false；2) needExplore=true 时，goal 必须具体、可验证；3) maxSteps 建议 1~5；4) allowedActions 仅可包含 click/scroll/goto；5) 不输出额外文本。

steps.desc: 规范化探索计划（步数/动作白名单）

action.code: function(gate, aiPlan, read){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).trim(); } function asBool(v){ if(v===true) return true; const s=asText(v).toLowerCase(); return s==='1'||s==='true'||s==='yes'||s==='on'; } function asNum(v,d,min,max){ let n=Number(v); if(!Number.isFinite(n)) n=d; if(Number.isFinite(min)) n=Math.max(min,n); if(Number.isFinite(max)) n=Math.min(max,n); return n; } const g=(gate&&typeof gate==='object')?gate:{}; const a=(aiPlan&&typeof aiPlan==='object')?aiPlan:{}; const r=(read&&typeof read==='object')?read:{}; const allowedRaw = Array.isArray(a.allowedActions) ? a.allowedActions : []; const allowedAll = ['click','scroll','goto']; const allowed=[]; const seen=new Set(); for(const one of allowedRaw){ const k=asText(one).toLowerCase(); if(!allowedAll.includes(k) || seen.has(k)) continue; seen.add(k); allowed.push(k); } const needExplore = asBool(a.needExplore); const goal = asText(a.goal || g.summaryQuery || ''); const maxByRead = asNum(r.exploreMaxSteps, 3, 1, 5); const maxByAI = asNum(a.maxSteps, maxByRead, 1, 5); return { needExplore: !!(g.canPlan && needExplore && goal), reason: asText(a.reason || ''), goal, maxSteps: maxByAI, allowedActions: allowed.length ? allowed : ['click','scroll','goto'] }; }

steps.desc: 决定是否执行 find.until
标记已尝试探索，避免重复循环

action.code: function(detailOut, plan){ const out=(detailOut&&typeof detailOut==='object')?{...detailOut}:{}; const meta=(out.meta&&typeof out.meta==='object')?{...out.meta}:{}; const p=(plan&&typeof plan==='object')?plan:{}; meta.exploreAttempted = true; meta.exploreUsed = true; meta.exploreStatus = 'planned'; meta.exploreReason = String(p.reason || ''); meta.exploreGoal = String(p.goal || ''); out.meta = meta; return out; }

steps.desc: 执行 find.until 进行页面探索（best-effort）
记录探索执行结果并回到提取流程

action.code: function(detailOut, invokeOut){ const out=(detailOut&&typeof detailOut==='object')?{...detailOut}:{}; const meta=(out.meta&&typeof out.meta==='object')?{...out.meta}:{}; const iv=(invokeOut&&typeof invokeOut==='object')?invokeOut:{}; const found = iv.found===true || iv.ok===true || (iv.value&&iv.value.found===true); meta.exploreStatus = found ? 'done' : 'failed'; meta.exploreFound = !!found; out.meta = meta; return out; }

steps.desc: 使用便宜模型对 summary 做统一提炼

action.prompt: 你是网页内容摘要助手。请基于给定标题与正文，返回 JSON：{summary:string}。若提供了 summaryQuery，请优先围绕该问题作答，尽量给出直接结论与关键依据；若信息不足，请明确说明不确定点。要求中文，2~4句，信息密度高，不要编造事实，不要输出 markdown。

steps.desc: 把 AI summary 写回 detailOut

action.code: function(detailOut, aiOut){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).trim(); } const out=(detailOut&&typeof detailOut==='object')?detailOut:{}; const data=(out.data&&typeof out.data==='object')?{...out.data}:{}; const ai=(aiOut&&typeof aiOut==='object')?aiOut:{}; const s=asText(ai.summary); if(s) data.summary=s; const meta=(out.meta&&typeof out.meta==='object')?{...out.meta}:{}; meta.summaryBy = s ? 'ai' : (meta.summaryBy || 'rule'); return { ...out, data, meta }; }

steps.desc: 返回 read.detail 结果
不支持的 read.action
读取失败

targetNorm.desc: 规范化后的 target 信息

summaryPlan.desc: 是否需要 AI 摘要增强

exploreAIPlanOut.desc: AI 返回的探索计划草案
